Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-28 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers dominating the long-term momentum rankings. EFXT ranks #1 with a score of 90.5, driven by explosive recent returns (281.68% over 1 year, 323.67% over 5 years) and perfect alignment across all moving averages, though notably it underperformed SPY by 48.21% over the past decade, suggesting this is a newer momentum story. MTZ shows even more extreme long-term performance with 1,611.96% returns over 10 years and a 5.78 ratio comparing decade-to-5-year returns, vastly outpacing SPY by 1,372.9% over that same period, indicating a sustained multi-decade outperformance. Both stocks pass 3-4 ratio thresholds and exhibit "clean" momentum signals with normal volatility, suggesting their gains are not accompanied by excessive risk metrics. The contrast between EFXT's recent dominance and MTZ's historical dominance highlights how the ranker captures both emerging and established secular trends across different timeframes.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
